requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Cold-Climate Derating for Sweden PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及瑞典光伏逆变器寒冷气候降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及瑞典光伏逆變器寒冷氣候降額

summary.en: For Sweden solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence (adopted by SIS as SS-EN IEC 62109) for the exact inverter model or family, supporting CE marking under the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU. SIS is the national standards body, Ei oversees the energy sector, Svenska kraftnät sets the grid code, and Elsäkerhetsverket supervises electrical safety, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Sweden is a cold-climate Nordic market, so safety files should also address low-temperature operation (often down to -40 °C), enclosure ingress protection, snow/ice loading, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, and derating for cold-climate exposure.
summary.zh: 对于瑞典太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据（SIS采用为SS-EN IEC 62109）准备，以支持依据低压指令2014/35/EU取得CE标志。SIS是国家标准机构，Ei监管能源行业，Svenska kraftnät设定电网规程，Elsäkerhetsverket监督电气安全，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。瑞典是寒冷气候的北欧市场，安全文件还应说明低温运行（通常低至-40°C）、外壳防护等级、积雪/结冰荷载、端子温升、通风以及针对寒冷气候暴露的降额。
summary.zht: 對於瑞典太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據（SIS採用為SS-EN IEC 62109）準備，以支持依據低壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌。SIS是國家標準機構，Ei監管能源行業，Svenska kraftnät設定電網規程，Elsäkerhetsverket監督電氣安全，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。瑞典是寒冷氣候的北歐市場，安全文件還應說明低溫運行（通常低至-40°C）、外殼防護等級、積雪／結冰荷載、端子溫升、通風以及針對寒冷氣候暴露的降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 / SS-EN IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 / SS-EN IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU and SIS standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
Ei, Svenska kraftnät, and Elsäkerhetsverket project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for cold-climate low-temperature operation, snow/ice loading, ingress protection, and thermal derating

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 / SS-EN IEC 62109 evidence for Sweden projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Sweden project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and cold-climate environmental exposure.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为瑞典项目的IEC 62109-1/-2 / SS-EN IEC 62109证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而瑞典项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和寒冷气候环境暴露。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為瑞典項目的IEC 62109-1/-2 / SS-EN IEC 62109證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而瑞典項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和寒冷氣候環境暴露。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Sweden IEC/SS-EN safety expectations or LVD CE-marking requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 (SS-EN IEC 62109) type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Sweden configuration (with Swedish-language documentation where expected), document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for cold-climate low-temperature operation, ingress protection, snow/ice loading, ventilation, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Sweden can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足瑞典IEC/SS-EN安全要求或LVD CE标志要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2（SS-EN IEC 62109）型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配瑞典配置（并在需要时提供瑞典语文件），记录保护配合和接地，并补充寒冷气候低温运行、外壳防护、积雪/结冰荷载、通风和热降额环境证据。针对瑞典对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足瑞典IEC/SS-EN安全要求或LVD CE標誌要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2（SS-EN IEC 62109）型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配瑞典配置（並在需要時提供瑞典語文件），記錄保護配合和接地，並補充寒冷氣候低溫運行、外殼防護、積雪／結冰荷載、通風和熱降額環境證據。針對瑞典對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for Swedish (EU) market access; SS-EN IEC 62109 evidence supports presumption of conformity. Effectively mandatory where Ei, Svenska kraftnät, the DSO, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Sweden

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Sweden PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 (SS-EN IEC 62109) type-test evidence for the exact model to support LVD CE marking, align labels and manuals to Sweden's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration (with Swedish-language documentation where expected), and document cold-climate low-temperature operation, snow/ice loading, ingress-protection, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current SIS, Ei, Svenska kraftnät, Elsäkerhetsverket, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瑞典光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2（SS-EN IEC 62109）型式试验证据以支持LVD CE标志，使标签和手册匹配瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz配置（并在需要时提供瑞典语文件），并记录寒冷气候低温运行、积雪/结冰荷载、防护等级和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行SIS、Ei、Svenska kraftnät、Elsäkerhetsverket及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 瑞典光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2（SS-EN IEC 62109）型式試驗證據以支持LVD CE標誌，使標籤和手冊匹配瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz配置（並在需要時提供瑞典語文件），並記錄寒冷氣候低溫運行、積雪／結冰荷載、防護等級和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行SIS、Ei、Svenska kraftnät、Elsäkerhetsverket及項目業主安全要求。
